Title: Getting Started with NUST LMS API

Nodes.Text:
NUST Learning Management System API for developer integrations (Moodle AJAX wrapper).
Authenticate with your NUST LMS credentials via `POST /auth/login` to receive a bearer token, then call any operation with `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The NustDevKit gateway logs into the LMS on your behalf and manages the underlying session (cookie + sesskey) server-side, so you never handle the ephemeral sesskey.
The API uses the following base URI:

This API uses the following authentication schemes.
* [`BearerAuth (OAuth 2 Bearer token)`]($h/__auth_BearerAuth)
The bearer token is sent in the request like this:
Exchange NUST LMS credentials for a gateway bearer token

Nodes.Title: Login
Nodes.Name: login
Nodes.Description: Authenticates against NUST LMS on your behalf and returns a gateway JWT. The LMS session (cookie + sesskey) is created and held server-side; use the returned token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` for every other operation.

Parameters.Name: body
Parameters.Description: NUST LMS credentials.

Fields.Name: username
Fields.Description: NUST LMS username.

Fields.Name: password
Fields.Description: NUST LMS password.

  --data-raw '{{ call["args"]["body"] | unwrap_add_props | json: true | replace: "'", "'\\''" }}'{% endif %}

Nodes.Title: Get Core Recent Courses
Nodes.Name: getCoreRecentCourses
Nodes.Description:
Returns the courses the authenticated user has accessed most recently, ordered by last access time.
Moodle method: `core_course_get_recent_courses`

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of courses to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of courses to return.; Default: 10

UsageExample.HttpCallTemplate: {"method":"GET","url":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/service/core_course_get_recent_courses{% capture inline_query_capture_876234 %}&limit={% if call["args"]["limit"] != nil %}{{ call["args"]["limit"] }}{% else %}null{% endif %}{% endcapture %}{% if inline_query_capture_876234.size > 0 %}?{% endif %}{{ inline_query_capture_876234 | remove_first:'&' }}","headers":{% capture header_capture_9023987234 %},"Accept":"application/json"{% if auth["BearerAuth"]["AccessToken"] != nil %},"Authorization":{{ auth["BearerAuth"]["AccessToken"] | prepend: 'Bearer ' | json: false }}{% endif %}{% endcapture %}{{ '{' }}{{ header_capture_9023987234 | remove_first:',' }}},"body":{{ '{' }}"type":"none"}}

Templates.HTTP_CURL_V1:
curl -X GET -G \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/service/core_course_get_recent_courses'  \
  -H 'Accept: application/json'{% if auth["BearerAuth"]["AccessToken"] != nil %} \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {% if is_masked == true %}{{ auth["BearerAuth"]["AccessToken"] | mask }}{% else %}{{ auth["BearerAuth"]["AccessToken"] }}{% endif %}'{% endif %} \
  -d 'limit={% if call["args"]["limit"] != nil %}{{ call["args"]["limit"] }}{% else %}{% endif %}'

Response.Name: response200
Response.Description: List of recently accessed courses ordered by last access.

Nodes.Title: Get Enrolled Courses by Timeline

Moodle method: `core_course_get_enrolled_courses_by_timeline_classification`

Parameters.Name: sort
Parameters.Description: Field used to sort enrolled course results.

limit.description: Maximum number of courses to return.; Default: 50

Nodes.Text: Calendar operations. On NUST LMS, these "action events" are how deadlines are surfaced — assignment, lab, quiz, and other submission due dates each appear as a calendar event on the day the work must be submitted.

Nodes.Title: Get Calendar Events by Timesort
Nodes.Name: getCalendarEventsByTimesort
Nodes.Description:
Returns action events (deadlines) across all enrolled courses, ordered by their sort timestamp. On NUST LMS these are submission due dates for assignments, labs, quizzes, and similar dated activities. Use `timesortfrom` to filter to upcoming deadlines only.
Moodle method: `core_calendar_get_action_events_by_timesort`

Parameters.Name: limitnum
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of events to return.

Parameters.Name: timesortfrom
Parameters.Description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp. Pass 0 for no lower bound.

Parameters.Name: timesortto
Parameters.Description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp.

Parameters.Name: aftereventid
Parameters.Description: Return events whose ID is greater than this value (cursor pagination).

Nodes.Title: Custom Field

Nodes.Title: User Preference
Nodes.Name: UserPreference
Nodes.Description:
A single user preference setting.

*This model accepts additional fields of type Object.*

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique numeric user identifier.

Fields.Name: username
Fields.Description: Login username for the user.

Fields.Name: fullname
Fields.Description: Full display name of the user.

Fields.Name: email
Fields.Description: Email address of the user.

Fields.Name: department
Fields.Description: Department the user belongs to within the institution.

Fields.Name: institution
Fields.Description: Name of the institution the user is affiliated with.

Fields.Name: idnumber
Fields.Description: Institution-assigned student or staff ID number.

Fields.Name: auth
Fields.Description: Authentication method used by the user (e.g., 'ldap', 'manual').

Fields.Name: confirmed
Fields.Description: Whether the user's account has been confirmed.

Fields.Name: lang
Fields.Description: Preferred interface language code (e.g., 'en').

Fields.Name: theme
Fields.Description: Preferred LMS theme; empty string means use the site default.

Fields.Name: timezone
Fields.Description: Timezone identifier. "99" means use the server default.

Fields.Name: mailformat
Fields.Description: Email format preference (1 = HTML).

Fields.Name: profileimageurlsmall
Fields.Description: URL to the user's small profile image (thumbnail).

Fields.Name: profileimageurl
Fields.Description: URL to the user's full-size profile image.

Fields.Name: customfields
Fields.Description: List of custom profile field values for the user.

Fields.Name: preferences
Fields.Description: List of stored preference key/value pairs for the user.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique notification identifier.

Fields.Description: User ID of the sender.

Fields.Name: useridto
Fields.Description: User ID of the recipient.

Fields.Name: subject
Fields.Description: Subject line of the notification.

Fields.Name: shortenedsubject
Fields.Description: Shortened version of the notification subject for compact display.

Fields.Name: text
Fields.Description: Short HTML excerpt of the notification.

Fields.Name: fullmessage
Fields.Description: Full plain-text body of the notification.

Fields.Name: fullmessageformat
Fields.Description: Format identifier for fullmessagehtml (2 = Markdown source).

Fields.Name: fullmessagehtml
Fields.Description: Full HTML body of the notification email.

Fields.Name: smallmessage
Fields.Description: Short plain-text preview of the notification.

Fields.Name: contexturl
Fields.Description: URL to the relevant context for this notification (e.g., a forum post).

Fields.Name: contexturlname
Fields.Description: Human-readable label for the context URL link.

Fields.Name: timecreated
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp when the notification was created.

Fields.Name: timecreatedpretty
Fields.Description: Human-readable relative time string (e.g., '19 days ago').

Fields.Name: timeread
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp when the notification was read; null if unread.

Fields.Name: read
Fields.Description: Whether the notification has been read by the recipient.

Fields.Name: deleted
Fields.Description: Whether the notification has been deleted by the recipient.

Fields.Name: iconurl
Fields.Description: URL to the icon image representing the notification source.

Fields.Name: component
Fields.Description: Moodle component that generated the notification (e.g., 'mod_forum').

Fields.Name: eventtype
Fields.Description: Event type within the component that triggered the notification (e.g., 'posts').

Fields.Name: customdata
Fields.Description: JSON-encoded string with additional notification metadata (cmid, instance, discussionid, postid, etc.).
